title: lessons-learned plugin configuration
description: Per-repo configuration for the lessons-learned plugins. Place this file at lessons-learned.config.json in your repo root (or .claude-plugin/lessons-learned.config.json for backward compatibility). All fields are optional; missing fields fall back to plugin defaults.

knowledgeBaseRoot.description: Path (relative to repo root) where the knowledge base lives.

language.description: Template language. Only English is supported in v0.x.

categories.description: Allowed top-level categories used to group entries in index.md. Defaults are domain-agnostic; override per repo as needed.

inclusionCriteria.description: Thresholds the recording flow applies before proposing a new entry.

minDomains.description: Minimum number of distinct domains/layers the problem spans (e.g., software + hardware, technical + organizational, code + config) to qualify.

minFactors.description: Minimum number of distinct components, factors, or causes involved in the problem or its resolution.

requireNonObviousDiagnosis.description: If true, the resolution must have required non-trivial diagnosis (the cause was not visible from the immediate symptoms).

preCommitHook.description: Enable the non-blocking pre-commit reminder hook (Claude Code plugin only).

memoryIntegration.description: If true, the Claude Code plugin offers to write a memory entry pointing at the knowledge base.

autoCrossReference.description: If true, the recording flow scans the index for related entries and proposes bidirectional `related:` links.
